field.label: Enable Module
field.comment: Master switch for all Panth Advanced SEO features.

field.label: Debug Logging
field.comment: Writes detailed SEO processing logs to var/log/panth_seo.log. Disable in production for performance.

field.label: Use Meta Templates
field.comment: Generate meta titles and descriptions from token-based templates when entities lack custom meta values.

field.label: Meta Title Max Length
field.comment: Maximum characters for the meta title tag. Google typically displays 50-60 characters. Recommended: 60.

field.label: Meta Description Max Length
field.comment: Maximum characters for the meta description tag. Google typically displays 150-160 characters. Recommended: 160.

field.label: Append Store Name to Title
field.comment: Appends " - Store Name" to all meta titles for brand consistency.

field.label: Strip Native Title Prefix/Suffix
field.comment: Removes Magento's default title prefix/suffix (configured in Content > Design > HTML Head) to give full control to templates.

field.label: Enable SEO Name Token
field.comment: Enables the {{seo_name}} token in meta templates, which uses the product's dedicated SEO name attribute if available.

field.label: Pagination Label Position
field.comment: Where to place the page number indicator in the meta title: prefix, suffix, or none.

field.label: Pagination Format
field.comment: Use %p as the page number placeholder. Default: | Page %p

field.label: Force Template Over Existing Meta
field.comment: When enabled, meta templates always override manually set meta title/description on products and categories. When disabled (default), entities with existing meta values keep them.

field.label: Emit Canonical Tag
field.comment: Outputs a rel="canonical" link tag on all pages to prevent duplicate content issues.

field.label: Strip Query String
field.comment: Removes all query parameters (e.g. ?p=2, ?product_list_order=name) from canonical URLs.

field.label: Lowercase Host
field.comment: Forces the hostname portion of canonical URLs to lowercase to prevent case-sensitive duplicates.

field.label: Remove Trailing Slash
field.comment: Removes trailing slashes from canonical URLs (except homepage, controlled separately).

field.label: Paginated Pages Canonical to Page 1
field.comment: When enabled, all paginated pages (p=2, p=3, etc.) point their canonical to page 1. When disabled (recommended), each page self-canonicalizes.

field.label: Associated Product Canonical to Parent
field.comment: Simple products used in configurables/grouped/bundles will point their canonical to the parent product URL.

field.label: Ignore Pages (one URL path per line)
field.comment: Pages matching these paths will not emit a canonical tag.

field.label: Disable Canonical for NOINDEX Pages
field.comment: Suppresses the canonical tag on pages marked as noindex, since search engines should not index them anyway.

field.label: Product Canonical URL Type
field.comment: Controls how product canonical URLs are built: without any category path, with the shortest category path, or with the longest/deepest category path.

field.label: Use Short Category URL for Canonical
field.comment: When enabled, uses the shortest (shallowest) URL path for category canonical URLs instead of the full nested path.

field.label: Trailing Slash on Homepage
field.comment: Controls trailing slash behavior for the homepage canonical URL, independent of the general "Remove Trailing Slash" setting.

field.label: Strip Query Parameters
field.comment: Comma-separated list of query parameter names to strip from canonical URLs (e.g. utm_source,utm_medium,gclid,fbclid). These are removed in addition to the "Strip Query String" option which removes all parameters.

field.label: Enable Open Graph Tags
field.comment: Outputs og:title, og:description, og:image, and og:url meta tags for rich social media previews (Facebook, LinkedIn, etc.).

field.label: Enable Twitter Card Tags
field.comment: Outputs twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description, and twitter:image meta tags for Twitter/X link previews.

field.label: Twitter Card Type
field.comment: summary_large_image shows a large featured image; summary shows a smaller thumbnail.

field.label: Twitter Site Handle
field.comment: e.g. @yourstore

group.label: Social Profiles (Organization sameAs)
group.comment: Enter full profile URLs. Non-empty values are added to the Organization schema sameAs array.

field.label: Facebook URL
field.comment: e.g. https://www.facebook.com/yourpage

field.label: Twitter (X) URL
field.comment: e.g. https://twitter.com/yourhandle

field.label: Instagram URL
field.comment: e.g. https://www.instagram.com/yourprofile

field.label: LinkedIn URL
field.comment: e.g. https://www.linkedin.com/company/yourcompany

field.label: YouTube URL
field.comment: e.g. https://www.youtube.com/c/yourchannel

field.label: Pinterest URL
field.comment: e.g. https://www.pinterest.com/yourprofile

field.label: TikTok URL
field.comment: e.g. https://www.tiktok.com/@yourprofile

group.label: Organization Details
group.comment: Override store-level identity fields used in Organization structured data. Leave empty to fall back to core Magento store information settings.

field.label: Legal Name
field.comment: Used as the "legalName" property in Organization schema.

field.label: Logo URL
field.comment: Full URL to the organization logo image (e.g. https://example.com/media/logo.png).

field.label: Phone
field.comment: Override the phone number from Store Information. Used in Organization contactPoint.

field.label: Email
field.comment: Contact email address for Organization contactPoint.

field.label: Country (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2)
field.comment: e.g. US, GB, DE

field.label: Additional sameAs URLs
field.comment: One URL per line. These are added to the Organization sameAs array in addition to the Social Profiles above.

field.label: Enable Product
field.comment: Emits Product JSON-LD with Offer, AggregateRating, and brand data on product detail pages.

field.label: Enable Breadcrumb
field.comment: Emits BreadcrumbList JSON-LD on all pages for rich breadcrumb display in search results.

field.label: Enable Organization
field.comment: Emits Organization JSON-LD on the homepage with name, logo, contact info, and social profiles.

field.label: Enable WebSite / SiteLinks
field.comment: Emits WebSite JSON-LD with SearchAction for Google Sitelinks Search Box eligibility.

field.label: Enable Auto-Extracted FAQ Schema (from descriptions)
field.comment: Scans CMS/product/category descriptions for heading/paragraph Q&A pairs and emits FAQPage JSON-LD. This does NOT control Panth_Faq's own schema block: when Panth_Faq is installed, it owns FAQPage emission on faq/* routes and on any page where its Schema block produces output, and this extractor automatically defers to it to prevent duplicate FAQPage nodes.

field.label: Enable Article
field.comment: Emits Article JSON-LD on CMS/blog pages with headline, datePublished, and author information.

field.label: Enable Review
field.comment: Emits AggregateRating and individual Review structured data on product pages with approved reviews.

field.label: Enable VideoObject
field.comment: Emits VideoObject JSON-LD for products with external video media gallery entries (YouTube, Vimeo).

field.label: Enable Brand
field.comment: Emits a Brand node within product structured data using the brand attribute or default brand name.

field.label: Enable Seller
field.comment: Emits a Seller node within the product Offer using the store name and configured business type.

field.label: Configurable: Multi-Offer (one Offer per child)
field.comment: Emits one Offer per simple child SKU within configurable product structured data, improving variant visibility in Google Shopping.

field.label: Remove Native Magento JSON-LD Markup
field.comment: Strips Magento's default Product and BreadcrumbList JSON-LD to prevent duplicate structured data conflicts.

field.label: Return Policy Days
field.comment: Number of days for the MerchantReturnPolicy hasMerchantReturnPolicy in product Offers. Default: 30.

field.label: Brand Attribute Code
field.comment: Product attribute code used to populate the Brand name in product structured data. Default: manufacturer.

field.label: GTIN Attribute Code
field.comment: Product attribute code for GTIN/EAN/UPC. Leave empty to omit the gtin property from product structured data.

field.label: MPN Attribute Code
field.comment: Product attribute code for Manufacturer Part Number. Leave empty to omit the mpn property from product structured data.

field.label: Enable Product List Schema (ItemList)
field.comment: Emits ItemList JSON-LD on category pages listing products with position, enabling rich carousel results.

field.label: Accepted Payment Methods
field.comment: One method per line (e.g. Visa, Mastercard, PayPal). Used in Offer structured data.

field.label: Delivery Methods
field.comment: One method per line (e.g. Standard Shipping, Express). Used in Offer structured data.

field.label: Product Condition
field.comment: Default schema.org itemCondition applied to all product offers.

field.label: Default Price Valid Until
field.comment: Format: YYYY-MM-DD. Used when product has no special_to_date.

field.label: Custom JSON-LD Properties (Product)
field.comment: JSON object merged into the Product structured-data node on product pages. Example: {"brand":{"@type":"Brand","name":"MyBrand"},"material":"Cotton"}. Leave empty to disable.

field.label: Enable ProductGroup + hasVariant (Configurable)
field.comment: Emits ProductGroup schema with hasVariant for each child of configurable products. Includes variesBy mapping for color, size, and material super attributes.

field.label: Enable Pros/Cons (positiveNotes/negativeNotes)
field.comment: Adds positiveNotes and negativeNotes ItemList structured data to product pages when the configured pros/cons attributes contain content.

field.label: Pros Attribute Code
field.comment: Product attribute (textarea) containing pros, one per line. Default: product_pros

field.label: Cons Attribute Code
field.comment: Product attribute (textarea) containing cons, one per line. Default: product_cons

field.label: Enable Energy Efficiency Label (EU)
field.comment: Emits hasEnergyConsumptionDetails (EnergyConsumptionDetails) on product pages using EU energy efficiency grades (A-G). Requires product attributes for the energy class and scale.

field.label: Energy Class Attribute Code
field.comment: Product attribute code that holds the energy efficiency grade (e.g. A, B, C, D, E, F, G). Default: energy_class

field.label: Enable Product Certifications
field.comment: Emits hasCertification (Certification) on product pages. Reads from a textarea attribute with one certification per line in the format: Authority | Name | ID.

field.label: Certification Attribute Code
field.comment: Product attribute code (textarea) containing certifications. Default: certifications

field.label: Enable Sale Event / Special Price Details
field.comment: Emits priceSpecification (UnitPriceSpecification) with validFrom/validThrough on product Offers with active special prices. On category pages, emits a SaleEvent node when category-wide sales are detected.

field.label: Seller Business Type
field.comment: The schema.org type used for the Seller node in product Offer structured data.

field.label: Default Brand Name
field.comment: Fallback brand name used when the product has no manufacturer attribute value.

field.label: Return Policy Type
field.comment: Whether returns result in a refund or exchange.

field.label: Return Fees
field.comment: Enter "free" for free returns, or a custom description (e.g. "$5.99 restocking fee").

field.label: Limited Stock Threshold
field.comment: Products with stock qty below this number emit LimitedAvailability instead of InStock in structured data. Default: 5.

field.label: Enable Template-Based Image Alt/Title
field.comment: When enabled, product image alt and title attributes are generated from configurable templates using tokens like {{name}}, {{store}}, {{sku}}, {{category}}.

field.label: Alt Text Template
field.comment: Tokens: {{name}}, {{store}}, {{sku}}, {{category}}, {{attribute:code}}. Filters: |truncate:N, |title, |lower. Default: {{name}} - {{store}}

field.label: Title Text Template
field.comment: Same token syntax as Alt template. Falls back to alt text when empty. Default: {{name}}

field.label: Apply to Gallery Images JSON
field.comment: Also inject alt/title into the product gallery images JSON (used by fotorama/gallery widgets).

field.label: Auto-Generate URL Key on Product Creation
field.comment: When enabled, new products without a manually entered URL key receive one generated from the template below.

field.label: URL Key Template
field.comment: Tokens: {{name}}, {{sku}}, {{attribute:code}}. Filters: |truncate:N, |lower. Example: {{name}}-{{sku}}

field.label: Also Apply to Existing Products on Save
field.comment: When enabled, the URL key template is re-applied every time an existing product is saved (overwriting any previous key).

field.label: Enable SEO-Friendly Filter URLs
field.comment: Rewrites layered navigation filter URLs from query strings to clean path-based URLs. Requires reindex after enabling.

field.label: URL Format
field.comment: Short format uses compact paths; long format includes attribute codes in the URL for clarity.

field.label: Separator Character
field.comment: Character used to separate filter values in the URL.

field.label: Enable Filter Page Meta Override
field.comment: Dynamically adjusts meta title and description on filtered category pages to include the active filter values.

field.label: Inject Filter Name in Meta Title
field.comment: Appends active filter labels (e.g. "Red, Size M") to the category meta title on filtered pages.

field.label: Inject Filter Name in Meta Description
field.comment: Appends active filter labels to the category meta description on filtered pages.

field.label: Enable Breadcrumb Priority
field.comment: When enabled, product breadcrumbs use category priority weights to choose the best path.

field.label: Breadcrumb Format
field.comment: When priorities are equal, selects path by depth: shortest (shallowest) or longest (deepest).

field.label: Enable Crawl Audit
field.comment: Enables periodic site crawl audits that check for broken links, missing meta tags, and redirect chains. Resource intensive on large catalogs.

field.label: Crawl Depth (max pages)
field.comment: Maximum number of pages to crawl per audit run. Default: 100.

field.label: Enable SEO Toolbar
field.comment: Shows an on-page SEO diagnostics toolbar on the storefront for allowed IPs.

field.label: SEO Toolbar Allowed IPs
field.comment: Comma-separated list of IP addresses. Leave empty to allow all (not recommended).

field.label: Enabled
field.comment: Outputs hreflang link tags for multi-language/multi-region stores to help search engines serve the correct locale.

field.label: Emit x-default
field.comment: Includes an x-default hreflang tag pointing to the default store, used by search engines when no locale matches the user.

field.label: Hreflang Scope
field.comment: Determines whether hreflang tags are resolved at website or global level.

field.label: CMS Page Relation Method
field.comment: How CMS pages across stores are matched for hreflang: by ID, URL key, or identifier.

field.label: Configuration Diagnostic
field.comment: Automated hreflang configuration checks. Save configuration to refresh results.

group.label: IndexNow Protocol
group.comment: Instantly notify Bing, Yandex, and other participating search engines when content changes. Learn more.

field.label: Enable IndexNow
field.comment: When enabled, product, category, and CMS page saves automatically submit the changed URL to IndexNow.

field.label: API Key
field.comment: A UUID-style key (e.g. a1b2c3d4e5f6...). Generate one at Bing IndexNow or enter any 8+ hex character string. The key is served at /seo/indexnow/key for verification.

field.label: Enable llms.txt
field.comment: When enabled, serves /llms.txt with a curated Markdown site map for LLM crawlers.

field.label: Site Summary
field.comment: Short summary of your store for the llms.txt header. Leave empty to auto-generate from store name.

field.label: Max Categories
field.comment: Maximum number of top-level categories to include in llms.txt. Default: 20.

field.label: Max Products
field.comment: Maximum number of products to include in llms.txt. Default: 50.

field.label: Max CMS Pages
field.comment: Maximum number of CMS pages to include in llms.txt. Default: 10.

field.label: Enable llms-full.txt (Expanded)
field.comment: Generates an expanded llms-full.txt with full descriptions, all categories, products with prices, and CMS content for shipping/returns/FAQ/about pages.

field.label: Shipping Policy CMS Page Identifier
field.comment: CMS page identifier (url_key) for the shipping policy page, e.g. "shipping-policy".

field.label: Returns Policy CMS Page Identifier
field.comment: CMS page identifier (url_key) for the returns/refund policy page, e.g. "returns-policy".

field.label: About Us CMS Page Identifier
field.comment: CMS page identifier (url_key) for the about us page, e.g. "about-us".

field.label: FAQ CMS Page Identifier
field.comment: CMS page identifier (url_key) for the FAQ page, e.g. "faq".

group.label: Google Merchant Feed
group.comment: Generate a Google Shopping XML product feed for free listings. The feed is served at /seo/feed/google and regenerated daily by cron to pub/media/panth_seo/google_feed_{store_code}.xml. CLI: bin/magento panth:seo:feed.

field.label: Enable Google Merchant Feed
field.comment: When enabled, the Google Shopping XML feed is served at /seo/feed/google and regenerated daily.

field.label: Include Out of Stock Products
field.comment: When enabled, out-of-stock products are included in the feed with availability "out of stock".

field.label: Google Product Category Attribute
field.comment: Product attribute code that holds the Google product category taxonomy value (e.g. google_product_category). Leave empty to omit.

field.label: Shipping Country
field.comment: Two-letter ISO country code, e.g. US, GB, DE. Leave empty to omit the shipping element.

field.label: Shipping Price
field.comment: Flat shipping price (e.g. 5.99). Leave empty to omit the shipping element.

group.label: Google Analytics 4
group.comment: Integrate GA4 measurement and enhanced ecommerce tracking. Outputs the gtag.js snippet and fires view_item, view_item_list, and add_to_cart events.

field.label: Enable GA4
field.comment: Enable Google Analytics 4 script output on the storefront.

field.label: Measurement ID
field.comment: Your GA4 Measurement ID (e.g. G-XXXXXXXXXX). Find it in Google Analytics > Admin > Data Streams. Only alphanumerics, dash and underscore are accepted; any other character is rejected both client-side and server-side.

field.label: Enhanced Ecommerce Events
field.comment: When enabled, fires GA4 enhanced ecommerce events (view_item, view_item_list) on product and category pages.

group.label: Google Search Console
group.comment: Search Console site verification and Google Indexing API integration for instant URL submission. Indexing API docs.

field.label: Site Verification Code
field.comment: The content value from the Google HTML tag verification method (e.g. abc123def456). Outputs a <meta name="google-site-verification"> tag.

field.label: Enable Indexing API
field.comment: When enabled, product, category, and CMS page saves automatically submit the changed URL to the Google Indexing API. Rate limited to 200 submissions per day.

field.label: Service Account JSON Key
field.comment: Paste the full JSON contents of your Google Cloud service account key file. The service account must have the Indexing API role. Stored encrypted.

field.label: Async Indexing via Queue
field.comment: Offloads SEO data indexing to the message queue for non-blocking catalog saves. Requires a running consumer.

field.label: Use MView for Incremental Rebuild
field.comment: Uses Magento's materialized view (changelog) system for incremental SEO data rebuilds instead of full reindex.

field.label: Enable Last-Modified HTTP Header
field.comment: Sets Last-Modified and ETag headers on product and category pages using the entity's updated_at timestamp. Enables efficient browser caching and CDN revalidation.

field.label: Enable Speculation Rules API
field.comment: Outputs browser-native Speculation Rules for prefetch/prerender on hover. Supported in Chrome 121+. Prerenders product pages and prefetches category pages. Excludes checkout, customer, wishlist, and cart paths.
